metadata.description: Matt Joyce's Claude Code plugin collection

plugins.name: kanban
plugins.description: Markdown-based Kanban board managed by Claude Code. Cards live as .md files — no database, no server.

plugins.name: zettlekasten-notes
plugins.description: Create and manage a Zettelkasten-style knowledge vault using Obsidian Flavored Markdown. Supports atomic notes, literature notes, permanent notes, and structure/MOC notes with wikilinks.
